§ 01 — About ThinkwareKorea's #1 dash cam brand
The company

30 years of trust,
built for the road ahead.

Since 1997, Thinkware has been Korea's most trusted dash cam brand — holding the #1 market share in navigation and dash cams through its INAVI brand. Official supplier to BMW and Mercedes-Benz, built to automotive-grade standards.

Every camera passes 144 rigorous quality tests, meets global security standards, and is made in Korea. Sold at Best Buy, Walmart, and backed by 400+ authorized installers nationwide — and engineered beyond recording to actively protect: ADAS Pioneer, and World's First Radar Dash Cam.

§ 02 — About the programThinkware · Real Voices
The idea

A brand ambassador program without the brand voice.

Real Voices pairs Thinkware with a small cohort of everyday drivers. Each selected participant receives a current-generation Thinkware dash cam, professional installation, and a simple ask in return: share the honest clips and stories their normal drives produce.

No scripts. No brand-speak. Twelve seats across six driver types. The road does the talking.

§ 03 — Who we're castingSix driver types

Six kinds of drivers.
One might be you.

We're casting two drivers from each of these profiles. You don't need to fit neatly — pick the one that sounds closest.

01 / 06Rideshare
The Rideshare Driver

Ten hours
on the road.

Uber, Lyft, DoorDash. Your car is your office. You know every shortcut in the city.

02 / 06Parent
The Parent Driver

School run,
every day.

Carpools, practice, snack debates. Your car is the family's second home.

03 / 06Long-Distance
The Long-Distance Commuter

Ninety minutes,
each way.

Eighteen thousand miles a year. You know the highway better than your own block.

04 / 06New Car
The New Car Owner

Fresh
off the lot.

First car, dream car, or upgrade. It's perfect and you'd like to keep it that way.

05 / 06Been-through-it
The Been-Through-It Driver

A second
chance.

A close call, a crash, or worse. You wish you'd had footage. Now you won't drive without it.

06 / 06Night
The Night Driver

After
hours.

Late-night shifts, red-eyes, 2 a.m. returns. The road at night is a different road.

§ 04 — What you getAnd more

We bring the gear.
You bring the drive.

001 · The cam
i.

A Thinkware dash cam, on us

A current-generation Thinkware dash cam shipped to your door. Yours to keep long after the program ends.

002 · The install
ii.

Professional installation

Certified installers in your area handle the wiring. You show up — they handle the dash panels.

003 · The extras
iii.

More to come

As the program unfolds, participants may receive additional benefits — details to be shared with selected drivers.

004 · The reach
iv.

Your story, amplified

Selected clips and quotes may run on Thinkware's official channels and Amazon listings. Credit goes to you.

"I'd rather trust a stranger who drove the same road than an ad that's never been in my car."
— Why Real Voices exists
§ 05 — How it goesFour simple steps

Four steps.
No catch.

Step 01

Apply

Fill out the short form. Tell us about your drives, your vehicle, and where you post.

Step 02

Review

Our team reviews applications across the six driver types on a rolling basis.

Step 03

Match

Selected drivers get an email, confirm details, and book a local install appointment.

Step 04

Drive

Drive normally. Capture what feels honest. Share what you want, when you're ready.

§ 06 — QuestionsMost-asked

A few things
people usually ask.

If something isn't answered here, drop it in the application — we'll follow up directly.

01Do I need a big social following to apply?+
No. We're casting for honest storytellers, not for follower counts. A private Instagram with 80 friends is as valid as 80,000 followers.
02What do I need to provide on my end?+
A car, a phone that shoots decent video, and a little bit of time. We handle the dash cam and the install.
03How much content is expected?+
We'll share a light guide once you're selected. Expect a handful of short clips and a couple of longer stories across a few months — nothing full-time.
04I've never made content before. Still eligible?+
Yes — and please apply. First-time storytellers are often exactly who we're looking for.
05When will I hear back?+
We review on a rolling basis. If you're moving forward, expect an email within a few weeks of applying.
· Applications open ·

Take the wheel.

Twelve drivers. Six types. One honest program. If it sounds like you — we'd love to hear from you.
